executives.name: Annette Clayton
executives.background: Former Chief Executive Officer and Chair of Schneider Electric North America.

executives.name: Dan Durn
executives.background: Mr. Durn has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since October 2021. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, Inc. from 2017 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Neill Reynolds
executives.background: Neill P. Reynolds joined Wolfspeed in August 2018 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Reynolds served as Senior Vice President of Finance, Strategy and Corporate Development at NXP Semiconductors N.V. and held various finance leadership roles at General Electric Company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Finance, Strategy and Procurement

board_of_directors.name: Annette Clayton
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Executive Officer and Chair of Schneider Electric North America.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Bonfield
board_of_directors.background: Sir Peter Bonfield is an Independent Director. He was formerly the CEO of British Telecommunications and Chairman and CEO of ICL plc. He has extensive experience in the international technology and telecommunications industries.
